name: Hasenoehrle (Rabbit Ears)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, egg, milk, and clarified butter in a bowl.
2. Mix until a firm noodle dough forms.
3. Let the dough rest for one hour.
4. On a floured pastry board, roll out the dough to the thickness of the back of a knife.
5. Cut into rectangles using a knife or pastry wheel.
6. Deep fry until golden brown.
7. While still hot, dust with sugar and cinnamon.
8. Serve.
Serves 4.
